instructionMap.root: Classify emails as "low" priority if they are casual, promotional, or routine updates with no actionable urgency—such as lunch invitations, newsletters, or discount offers. Reserve "normal" priority for communications that require attention but aren’t time-sensitive, like meeting reminders or feature announcements. Clearly distinguish non-urgent content from moderately important operational messages to avoid overclassifying trivial emails as "normal".
